prompt: an image of a single red flower in a glass vase on a windowsill, using the mask to define the shape of the flower. Background should be softly lit with sunlight streaming in.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image of a single red flower. The flower's shape must precisely match the silhouette defined by the white area in image 1. It is placed in a clear glass vase, which rests directly on a windowsill. The background beyond the windowsill is softly lit, with visible rays of sunlight streaming into the room.
objects: rays of sunlight streaming into the room
